user: close all my tabs except this one
content:
<tool_call>{"name":"execute_js","arguments":{"js":"chrome.tabs.query({currentWindow: true}, (tabs) => {
  const currentTabId = tabs.find(t => t.active).id;
  const tabsToClose = tabs.filter(t => t.id !== currentTabId);
  tabsToClose.forEach(tab => chrome.tabs.remove(tab.id));
});"}}</tool_call>
